description: Evaluation cases for multi-agent local workflow orchestration

test_cases.name: Parallel Codebase Analysis
test_cases.description: Decompose codebase analysis into parallel subtasks across modules
test_cases.prompt: I need to analyze a large Python codebase for security issues. The codebase has these directories: auth/, api/, database/, and utils/. Each directory is independent. Run the analysis in parallel and combine the results.
expected_behavior: Decomposes task into 4 parallel subtasks (one per directory)
Selects Docker as default backend for local execution
Uses merge aggregation strategy for combining results

evaluation_criteria.decomposition_correct: Task split into independent module-based subtasks
evaluation_criteria.aggregation_appropriate: merge strategy used for structured outputs
evaluation_criteria.result_complete: All 4 module analyses included in final report

test_cases.name: Phased Refactoring with Dependencies
test_cases.description: Two-phase workflow: analyze first, then refactor based on analysis
test_cases.prompt: Refactor our API layer. First, have agents analyze each endpoint file in parallel. Then, once all analyses complete, have a synthesis agent create a unified refactoring plan based on all the analyses.
expected_behavior: Uses wait_for_phase.py to block until phase 1 completes
Phase 2: Spawns synthesis agent with --depends-on flag
Final output references all phase 1 results

evaluation_criteria.phase_1_parallel: Multiple agents spawned for endpoint analysis
evaluation_criteria.ordering_correct: Phase 2 only runs after phase 1 completes

test_cases.name: Parallel Test Execution via Sharding
test_cases.description: Shard test files across multiple agents for faster execution
test_cases.prompt: Our test suite has 200 test files and takes 45 minutes to run. Split the tests across 4 parallel agents to speed this up.
expected_behavior: Uses file sharding strategy (200 files / 4 = 50 per agent)
Generates shards using find + split or similar
Spawns 4 agents with distinct test file subsets
Aggregates test results with concat or merge strategy

evaluation_criteria.no_overlap: Each file assigned to exactly one agent
evaluation_criteria.all_files_covered: Union of shards equals full test set

test_cases.name: CI Backend with Matrix Strategy
test_cases.description: Use GitHub Actions matrix for parallel multi-environment testing
test_cases.prompt: We need to test our library across Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12. Set up parallel CI agents for each version.

test_cases.name: Graceful Handling of Partial Failures
test_cases.description: Continue aggregation when some agents fail
test_cases.prompt: Run 5 parallel data processing agents. If some fail, I still want results from the successful ones. Fail only if more than 60% of agents fail.

test_cases.name: Kubernetes Job Scaling
test_cases.description: Scale agents via Kubernetes for large workloads
test_cases.prompt: I have a K8s cluster. Run 10 agents to process a large dataset, splitting it into 10 shards. Use the warp-agents namespace.
expected_behavior: Each Job processes one data shard
Collects results from PVC or logs

evaluation_metrics.decomposition_accuracy: How well tasks are split into independent subtasks
evaluation_metrics.backend_appropriateness: Selection of correct backend for the scenario
evaluation_metrics.spawn_correctness: Valid spawn commands with proper parameters
evaluation_metrics.error_handling: Graceful handling of failures and edge cases
